ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: City where the team is based
URL to the team's official website
ID of the team that played the game
Whether the game went into overtime
Name of the venue where the game was played
ID of the team the player belongs to
Round in which the player was drafted
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach)
Date and time of the last login
Date and time the user account was created
Date and time the user account was last updated
